title: Norwegian Smoky Potato Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting casserole featuring smoky Norwegian potatoes, roasted vegetables, and a crispy xtra topping.
instructions: Peel and dice the Norwegian potatoes. Boil in salted water until slightly tender.
Sauté the smoky roasted vegetables with olive oil and roasted garlic until caramelized.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked potatoes, roasted vegetables, and xtra cheese.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Top with additional xtra cheese and a sprinkle of paprika.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
